functions.name: deploy-call-center-voice-ai
functions.description: Deploy Voice AI — configure Azure Communication Services, Speech Service (STT+TTS), OpenAI, Content Safety. Set up WebSocket streaming, SSML templates, call recording. Use when: deploy, provision, configure.

functions.name: deploy-call-center-voice-ai
functions.description: Deploy Voice AI — configure Azure Communication Services, Speech Service (STT+TTS), OpenAI, Content Safety. Set up WebSocket streaming, SSML templates, call recording. Use when: deploy, provision, configure.

functions.name: evaluate-call-center-voice-ai
functions.description: Evaluate Voice AI — test intent recognition accuracy, response latency (STT+LLM+TTS < 2s), call resolution rate, CSAT scores, barge-in handling. Use when: evaluate, test, quality, metrics.

functions.name: evaluate-call-center-voice-ai
functions.description: Evaluate Voice AI — test intent recognition accuracy, response latency (STT+LLM+TTS < 2s), call resolution rate, CSAT scores, barge-in handling. Use when: evaluate, test, quality, metrics.

functions.name: tune-call-center-voice-ai
functions.description: Tune Voice AI — optimize STT recognition, TTS voice/prosody, LLM response speed, model routing, intent classification thresholds. Use when: tune, optimize, latency, cost.

functions.name: tune-call-center-voice-ai
